channel.title: GeoPulse. Geopolitics in brief
channel.description: Signal-first briefings on geopolitics, edited by Lavkesh Dwivedi.

item.title: Trump remains ‘in a quandary’ despite Iran war ceasefire extension
item.description: Trump extended a ceasefire with Iran after a request from Pakistan. Trump remains ‘in a quandary’ despite Iran war ceasefire extension Al Jazeera.

item.title: Trump extends ceasefire until Iranian proposal is submitted, talks are over
item.description: Trump extended the ceasefire until Iran submits a unified proposal. Pakistan requested the move to allow Iranian leaders to come up with a proposal. The U. S. President ⁠said he was acting at the request of ​Pakistan to ‌hold off attacks until Iranian leaders and representatives could come ‌up with what ​he called a unified proposal.

item.title: Trump extends ceasefire until Iran submits proposal
item.description: Trump extended the ceasefire with Iran until a proposal is submitted. The move came after an Iranian commander threatened to destroy the region's oil industry. An Iranian commander had threatened to destroy the region's oil industry if war resumed with the U. S.

item.title: Trump suggests he won’t end ceasefire with Iran even if talks are productive
item.description: Trump said he will not end the Iran ceasefire even if talks are productive. Iran war live updates: Trump suggests he won’t end ceasefire with Iran even if talks are productive MS NOW.

item.title: US Sanctions Target Iranian Weapons, UAV Procurement Networks
item.description: The US imposed sanctions on Iranian weapons and UAV procurement networks. The sanctions aim to disrupt supply chains supporting Iran's military capabilities. US Sanctions Target Iranian Weapons, UAV Procurement Networks.

item.title: 2 Americans Killed in Mexico Crash Were C.I.A. Members
item.description: Two Americans killed in a Mexico crash were CIA members on a counter-cartel operation. The two Americans were killed on Sunday when their vehicle crashed while returning from a counter-cartel operation led by Mexico’s armed forces in the state of Chihuahua.

item.title: Iran War Live Updates: Trump Extends Cease-Fire With Iran
item.description: Trump extended a ceasefire with Iran at Pakistan's request to mediate an end. The pause in hostilities had been set to expire within hours. The president said Pakistan, which is trying to mediate an end to the war, requested he hold off any attacks.

item.title: Uncertainty Surrounds U.S.-Iran Talks as Cease-Fire Nears End
item.description: Trump extended a cease-fire before the deadline expired, putting Vance's trip on hold. Iran Live Updates: Trump Extends Cease-Fire Before Deadline Expires; Vance’s Trip on Hold The New York Times.

item.title: Iran Threatens To End Gulf Nations' Oil Production As Truce Deadline Nears
item.description: Iran's Revolutionary Guards threatened to end Gulf nations' oil production. The threat was made as a truce deadline nears. Iran's Revolutionary Guards on Tuesday threatened to end oil production in the Middle East if the Islamic republic faced attacks launched from its Gulf neighbours' territory.

item.title: What To Know As Trump Extends Ceasefire In Iran War
item.description: Trump extended the Iran ceasefire indefinitely. Trump announced that the ceasefire would be extended indefinitely. What To Know As Trump Extends Ceasefire In Iran War.

item.title: Real Madrid close on Barcelona as Mbappe and Vinicius net against Alaves
item.description: Real Madrid beat Alaves 2-1 to close the gap with Barcelona to six points. Real Madrid beat relegation-threatened Alaves 2-1 in La Liga to close the gap with leaders Barcelona to six points.

item.title: Trump Announces Iran Ceasefire Extension Until Negotiations Conclude
item.description: The US-Iran ceasefire is set to expire, casting doubt on ongoing talks. The ceasefire was established after the US-Iran war broke out on February 28, but its terms are now under review.

item.title: Trump Extends Iran Ceasefire Indefinitely With Peace Talks in Limbo
item.description: Trump extended the Iran ceasefire indefinitely amid uncertain peace talks. Iran War Live News Updates: Trump Extends Iran Ceasefire Indefinitely With Peace Talks in Limbo WSJ.

item.title: Lufthansa cuts 20,000 flights amid soaring jet fuel costs
item.description: Lufthansa is cutting 20,000 short-haul flights from its summer schedule to save on soaring jet fuel costs. The airline aims to reduce its fuel expenses by adjusting its flight operations.

item.title: Trump Extends Iran Ceasefire, Hormuz Blockade To Continue
item.description: Trump extended the Iran ceasefire until a proposal is submitted. The Hormuz blockade will continue. Trump says extending ceasefire until Iranian proposal is submitted and discussions are concluded. Trump Extends Iran Ceasefire, Hormuz Blockade To Continue.

item.title: EU eyes options as Iran conflict threatens jet fuel shortages
item.description: Europe faces jet fuel shortages due to the Hormuz blockade. Imports are heavily relied upon. The blockade of the Strait of Hormuz is causing concern in Europe, which relies heavily on imported jet fuel.

item.title: As Pakistan seeks to broker U.S.–Iran peace, citizens watch for gains at home
item.description: Pakistan is working to broker peace between the U. S. and Iran, but many Pakistanis are watching to see if the diplomatic efforts will lead to improvements at home. They are waiting for tangible benefits from the diplomatic boost.

item.title: U.S. Turns Up Pressure on Iraq to Distance Itself From Iran
item.description: The U. S. is pressuring Iraq to dismantle Iran-backed militias that have been attacking American sites. Washington demands the Baghdad government take action against these militias. Washington is demanding that the Baghdad government dismantle Iran-backed Iraqi militias that have been attacking Americans and U. S.

item.title: 2 CIA Officers Killed In Mexico Vehicle Crash After Anti-Drug Op: Report
item.description: Two CIA officers were killed in a vehicle crash in Mexico while returning from an anti-drug operation. The officials had destroyed a drug lab in Chihuahua. The officials were returning after destroying a drug lab in Chihuahua.

item.title: Two Palestinians Killed in Israeli Shooting Near West Bank School
item.description: Israeli forces killed two Palestinians, including a child, near a West Bank school. The Israeli military said it was trying to break up clashes in Al Mughayir, an area with rising settler violence.
